vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #27

plan.title: Make rain warning window (within ~X hrs) a user setting under Weather Warnings

narratives.Description: Make rain warning window (within ~X hrs) a user setting under Weather Warnings
narratives.Overview:
## Request
Let the user configure the rain warning look-ahead window (the "within ~X hrs" horizon) in Settings.

### Current behavior
The forecast window is a hard-coded constant — `OpenMeteoMapper.forecastWindowHours = 6` — used both for the API request (`forecast_hours`) and for the "hours until rain" calculation. There is no UI to change it.

### Desired behavior
- Add a **Weather Warnings** section in Settings.
- Within it, expose a control for the **rain warning window** (e.g. a stepper or picker for the number of hours, such as 1–12).
- Persist the choice (UserDefaults via `AppSettings`) and feed it into the weather fetch/mapping so the "Rain possible within ~Xhrs" cue and the underlying request both respect it.

### Notes / open questions
- Suggested default: keep 6 hours.
- Decide sensible min/max bounds (Open-Meteo `forecast_hours` supports small windows; cap appropriately).
- This section can later hold other warning thresholds (cold/freeze, thunderstorm) for consistency.
narratives.FunctionalRequirements:
FR-1: AppSettings MUST persist a rain warning window in hours, clamped to 1-12, defaulting to 6.
FR-2: A new 'Weather Warnings' Settings section MUST expose a stepper for the window.
FR-3: Changing the window MUST update both the Open-Meteo request (forecast_hours) and the 'within ~Xhrs' calculation, refreshing the current reading.
narratives.Architecture: Add AppSettings.rainWarningWindowHours (UserDefaults-backed, clamped 1-12, default 6). Thread the value through WeatherProvider.fetch(..., windowHours:), OpenMeteoWeatherService.makeURL(..., windowHours:), and OpenMeteoMapper.snapshot(..., windowHours:)/hoursUntilRain(..., windowHours:). WeatherController holds the current window with setWindowHours(_:) that refetches. AppModel seeds the controller from settings and adds a Combine sink on settings.$rainWarningWindowHours. SettingsView adds a 'Weather Warnings' section with a Stepper bound to settings.rainWarningWindowHours.
narratives.TestingStrategy: Unit tests: AppSettings clamps and persists the window; OpenMeteoMapper respects a custom window (finds/ignores rain outside it); makeURL emits the chosen forecast_hours; WeatherController.setWindowHours triggers a refetch. Build on the simulator and confirm the Settings stepper + live cue update.

items.title: Persist a clamped rain warning window in AppSettings

narrative.Acceptance: rainWarningWindowHours persists across launches, clamps to 1-12, defaults to 6.

items.title: Thread the window through the weather fetch + mapping

narrative.Acceptance: The Open-Meteo request and the 'within ~Xhrs' calc both use the configured window.
A stepper under 'Weather Warnings' changes the window and the cue updates.

references.title: Issue #27: Make rain warning window (within ~X hrs) a user setting under Weather Warnings
